projects.name: Business site built in HTML and CSS
projects.description: This previews the layout of a signup form with different input types for a business.

projects.name: Weather app built in JavaScript, using API
projects.description: Using API this page fetches weather data. The user can interact by searching, getting forecast for the next few days and marking  favorite.

projects.name: Book library built in React
projects.description: A Book library that shows a list of book previews. It has common functionality like a searchbar, filters and sorting options, and by interacting with a preview you get more information on the book, or get sent to a web store.

projects.name: News site built in HTML and CSS
projects.description: This demo shows a news site layout. It is made with HTML and CSS alone, and is structured with both grid and flexbox.

projects.name: Pizzabot built in JavaScript
projects.description: The bot is designed to give a prompted menu that the user interacts with by typing into it and getting a new prompt.

projects.name: Recipe library built in JavaScript
projects.description: This is a recipe library. It has common functionality like a searchbar, filters and sorting options.

projects.name: Survey page in React
projects.description: Here you can see an example of a survey form made in React.
